creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
All options are used e.g., OPENGL adds -Dopengl=enabled per OPENGL_MESON_ENABLED; TEST adds -Dtests=true via TEST_MESON_TRUE.

$ pkg install portfmt
$ portscan -p . graphics/libplacebo
[100%] finished in 0s

poudriere bulk (without -t) also passes see,
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/131amd64-default/d180e00f73d2/logs/libplacebo-5.264.1.log
